message:
test(extent): add 9 edge-case tests for map/alloc/truncate/split paths

Cover: over-max-count validation, holes between extents, partial extent
overlap, empty tree truncate, split_for_mark_written (all 4 overlap
cases: full/left/right/three-way), ExtentMapping equality.
Total: 21 tests (was 12).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
